issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' but must specify it triggers when playing a Character with no base effect, not just any card. Current DSL is missing the character filter.

Condition is wrong. Should check: (1) you have ≤3 Characters on board AND (2) the played card is a Character with no base effect. Current condition only checks HasCardOnBoard but doesn't validate character count threshold or 'no base effect' requirement.
Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Should be 'AttachDon' (attaching/setting DON!! cards as active). GiveDon implies gaining Don counters, not activating existing DON!! cards.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' frequency restriction in DSL structure.
